notes: Kills the last black-hole: a worker could wedge BEFORE reporting Step 1 (a zombie SMB file-stat with no timeout) and sit at 'Starting…' 0% GPU forever while heartbeats kept the server trusting it. Node now times out the source-size stat (10s) and errors+re-maps instead of hanging; server now requeues any job stuck at 0% for 20+ min with a live worker (the ghost check skipped it because the node was heartbeating, and the 2h stuck check skipped it because progress was 0). Both GPUs stay busy without babysitting.
